changes: Cover: Range has been extended from 10 to 20 yalms.
Intervene: Now acquired at level 66 (previously level 74).
Hallowed Ground: The effects of this action will now be applied earlier.
Holmgang: The effects of this action will now be applied earlier.
Chaotic Cyclone: The hit detection for this action will now trigger earlier.
Dark Mind: Now also reduces physical damage taken by 10%.
Living Dead: The effects of this action will now be applied earlier.
Abyssal Drain: Cure potency has been increased from 200 to 500.
Carve and Spit: The additional effect 'Restores own HP' has been added with a cure potency of 500.
Bloodspiller: Potency has been increased from 580 to 600.
Dark Missionary: Now acquired at level 66 (previously level 76) and now also reduces physical damage taken by 5%.
Scarlet Delirium: Potency has been increased from 600 to 620.
Comeuppance: Potency has been increased from 700 to 720.
Torcleaver: Potency has been increased from 800 to 820.
Aurora: Cure potency has been increased from 200 to 300.
Superbolide: The effects of this action will now be applied earlier; no longer reduces HP to 1, and instead reduces HP to 50% of maximum.
Heart of Light: Now also reduces physical damage taken by 5%.
Hypervelocity: Potency has been reduced from 180 to 160.
Melee Mastery II: Potency increase change from 220 to 200.
Double Down: Cartridge cost has been reduced from 2 to 1.
Piercing Talon: Lance Mastery trait increases potency from 150 to 200; Enhanced Piercing Talon effect added, increasing potency to 350.
Elusive Jump: Additional effect 'Grants Enhanced Piercing Talon' added with a duration of 15 seconds.
Geirskogul: Stacks of Nastrond Ready granted reduced from 3 to 1.
Mirage Dive: Potency increased from 200 to 380.
Nastrond: Potency increased from 300 to 600; Lance Mastery III potency increase changed from 360 to 720.
Stardiver: Potency increased from 620 to 720; Melee Mastery potency increase changed from 720 to 820.
Starcross: Range increased from 3 to 20 yalms; Potency increased from 900 to 1,000.
Throwing Dagger: Melee Mastery II trait increases potency from 120 to 200.
Dream Within a Dream: Potency increased from 150 to 180.
Dokumori: Changed from single target to a cone dealing 300 potency to the first target and 25% less for remaining.
Ten Chi Jin: Players can now move while under the effect.
Tenri Jindo: Hit detection triggers earlier.
Hissatsu: Gyoten: Recast time reduced from 10 to 5 seconds.
Gyofu: Potency increased from 230 to 240.
Zanshin: Potency increased from 820 to 900.
Tendo Kaeshi Setsugekka: Motions and visual effects changed.
Arcane Circle: Circle of Sacrifice now also grants stacks of Immortal Sacrifice when you or party members successfully land an ability.
Void Reaping, Cross Reaping, Grim Reaping: Hotbar icon no longer illuminated when remaining Lemure Shroud stacks are at 1 (after learning Communio).
Executioner's Gallows: Hit detection triggers earlier.
Heated Clean Shot: Potency increased from 140 to 160; Combo potency increased from 400 to 420.
Blazing Shot: Potency increased from 220 to 240.
Flamethrower: Area of effect increased from 8 to 12 yalms; Potency increased from 80 to 100.
Double Check: Potency increased from 160 to 170.
Checkmate: Potency increased from 160 to 170.
Fan Dance: Dynamic Dancer trait increases potency from 150 to 180.
Curing Waltz: Area of effect increased from 3 to 5 yalms.
Fan Dance III: Dynamic Dancer trait increases potency from 200 to 220.
Starfall Dance: Action change settings enabled to switch with Devilment.
Flare: Cast time reduced from 4 to 3 seconds.
Ley Lines: Now a charged action (max 2 charges); Cannot be executed while under the effect of Ley Lines.
Despair: Enhanced Astral Fire trait makes cast time instant.
Enhanced Enochian IV: Effect potency reduced from 33% to 32%.
Crimson Cyclone: Additional effect 'Grants Crimson Strike Ready' added.
Crimson Strike: No longer a combo action; requires Crimson Strike Ready.
Summon Ifrit II: Inferno potency increased from 750 to 800.
Summon Titan II: Earthen Fury potency increased from 750 to 800.
Summon Garuda II: Aerial Blast potency increased from 750 to 800.
Sunflare: Potency increased from 700 to 800.
Verflare: Potency increased from 620 to 650.
Verholy: Potency increased from 620 to 650.
Scorch: Potency increased from 700 to 750.
Resolution: Potency increased from 800 to 850.
Pom Motif: A pom will appear on canvas upon entering instanced duties or restarting.
Hammer Motif: A hammer will appear on canvas upon entering instanced duties or restarting.
Starry Sky Motif: A starry sky will appear on canvas upon entering instanced duties or restarting.
Starry Muse: Ground effect will not appear when battle effects are set to Show Limited.
Esuna: Cast time made instant.
Holy: Cast time reduced from 2.5 to 1.5 seconds.
Asylum: Visual effects adjusted.
Glare III: Potency increased from 330 to 340.
Holy III: Cast time reduced from 2.5 to 1.5 seconds.
Afflatus Misery: Potency increased from 1,320 to 1,360.
Divine Caress: Area of effect increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Embrace: Cure potency increased from 150 to 180.
Adloquium: MP cost reduced from 1,000 to 900.
Succor: MP cost reduced from 1,000 to 900.
Seraphic Veil: Cure potency increased from 150 to 180.
Concitation: MP cost reduced from 1,000 to 900.
Manifestation: MP cost reduced from 1,000 to 900.
Accession: MP cost reduced from 1,000 to 900.
Gravity: Area of effect increased from 5 to 8 yalms.
Gravity II: Area of effect increased from 5 to 8 yalms.
Prognosis: MP cost reduced from 800 to 700.
Eukrasian Diagnosis: MP cost reduced from 900 to 800.
Eukrasian Prognosis: MP cost reduced from 900 to 800.
Dosis III: Potency increased from 360 to 370.
Toxikon II: Potency increased from 360 to 370.
Pneuma: Potency increased from 360 to 370.
Eukrasian Prognosis II: MP cost reduced from 900 to 800.
Philosophia: Area of effect increased from 20 to 30 yalms.

new_content.name: An Otherworldly Encounter
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: A Present from the Present
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Duty Support
new_content.description: Expansion of Duty Support to include Halatali and Yuweyawata Field Station.

new_content.name: Outfit Glamour
new_content.description: Feature to condense a set combination of items into a single slot in the glamour dresser.

new_content.name: Pelupelu Allied Society
new_content.description: New allied society with a base of operations at Dock Poga.

new_content.name: Graphical Update
new_content.description: Improvements to player character models, gear, and vegetation rendering.

housing.name: Pure White Interior Wall
housing.description: An interior wall of plain, pristine white for maximum versatility.

housing.name: Light Wood Flooring
housing.description: Flooring made from rustic planks in an unpretentious pale shade.

housing.name: Flat Ceiling Lamp
housing.description: This unobtrusive lighting fixture is ideal for those who would rather not draw attention to the ceiling.

housing.name: Square Stepping Stones
housing.description: Square stones of varying sizes, carefully placed so as to avoid crushing the flowers.

housing.name: Ja Ja Gural Tree
housing.description: Originating in the depths of Cenote Ja Ja Gural, this luminescent tree lights up your lawn quite vividly.

housing.name: Far Eastern Gazebo
housing.description: A gazebo designed in the Far Eastern fashion.

housing.name: Royal Bed
housing.description: Rumor has it a royal family in the world of Vana'diel sleeps on resplendent beds such as these.

housing.name: Classroom Chair
housing.description: This sturdy chair was built to accommodate young students throughout their educational journey.

housing.name: Storybook Bench
housing.description: Beloved by the orphans of Menphina's Arms, this bench is perfect for reading stories aloud to friends.

housing.name: Sweet Dreamer's Stall
housing.description: Packed chock-full of sweets and treats, this stall is guaranteed to delight children and inner children alike.

housing.name: Billiard Table
housing.description: Upon this finely crafted table, a pole is used to strike a ball at other balls to knock them into the side pockets.

housing.name: Climbing Wall Partition
housing.description: Colorful footholds have been added to this partition to create an indoor climbing fixture.

housing.name: Wood-fired Range
housing.description: This multi-purpose brick oven doubles as a charming fireplace.

housing.name: Tea Caddy Cabinet
housing.description: A professional tea drinker must always keep their estate well stocked.

housing.name: Cushioned Bench
housing.description: A wooden bench fitted with a sumptuously soft seat.

housing.name: Patchwork Sofa
housing.description: Stitched together using a hodgepodge of leather scraps, this sofa has a uniquely colorful charm.

housing.name: Tropical Canopy Bed
housing.description: To rest upon this bed is to be whisked away to warmer climes and memories of past vacations.

housing.name: Rail-and-stile Partition
housing.description: With no panes of glass, what's to stop you from climbing straight through?

housing.name: Classroom Desk
housing.description: This compact desk was built to accommodate young students throughout their educational journey.

housing.name: Laboratory Counter
housing.description: The inclusion of a sink makes this table well suited to experiments that involve dangerous chemicals.

housing.name: Contemporary Iron Shelf
housing.description: The metal framework will support even the heaviest of potted plants.

housing.name: Fighting Ring
housing.description: A scaled-down version of the type commonly used in martial arts competitions, this arena still gives you plenty of room to maneuver.

housing.name: Gleaner's Knapsack
housing.description: Used to carry both supplies and commissions, the knapsack is arguably the most vital item among a gleaner's possessions.

housing.name: Apothecary Mortar
housing.description: Includes a selection of wild herbs commonly ground into medicine.

housing.name: Popoto Chips
housing.description: Thin slices of popoto, fried to a golden crisp and lightly salted to create the perfect snack.

housing.name: Kugane-yaki
housing.description: The official name of this Far Eastern snack is hotly contested, with some insisting upon "blade buns" as a nod to the fan-like pattern.

housing.name: Eternal Cenotaph
housing.description: This monument stands as a solemn reminder of a queen who placed her beloved people above all else.

housing.name: Classroom Blackboard
housing.description: Large enough to fit a single day's lesson in any one subject. Chalk and duster included.

housing.name: Weathered Porthole
housing.description: Relax below deck and enjoy smooth sailing, all from the comfort of your estate.

housing.name: Investigation Map
housing.description: Clues and clippings linked together with thread in the fashion of a master sleuth.

housing.name: Dartboard Cabinet
housing.description: Unlike archery or javelin throwing, this game may safely be played indoors.

housing.name: Holodisplay
housing.description: Activate (and deactivate) projections of important-looking graphs with the press of a button.

housing.name: Botanist's Wall Frames
housing.description: A collection of wall hangings that celebrate flora and fauna. A painting of one's choosing may be placed in the center frame.

housing.name: Frilly Curtains
housing.description: The lace hem of the top treatment adds a delicate touch to these cutesy curtains.

housing.name: Imitation Closet
housing.description: For those who only want the appearance of storage space.

housing.name: Botanical Loft
housing.description: Lush green ivy dangles through the slats of this wood lattice fixture.

housing.name: Indoor Awning
housing.description: The perfect accompaniment to reading nooks, storefront counters, and more.

housing.name: Grassy Rug
housing.description: Brings new meaning to the phrase "home turf."

glamour.name: Wintertide Trapper's Hat
glamour.description: Head piece part of the Wintertide set.

glamour.name: Wintertide Blouson
glamour.description: Body piece part of the Wintertide set.

glamour.name: Wintertide Culottes
glamour.description: Legs piece part of the Wintertide set.

glamour.name: Wintertide Sheath Skirt
glamour.description: Legs piece part of the Wintertide set.

glamour.name: Wintertide Shoes
glamour.description: Feet piece part of the Wintertide set.
